title: Mynthos Juice
description: The famous mynthos juice, a true french reference
body:
**mynthos juice** is a reference to the French streamer mynthos. I was asked to do it again, so I'm making it available here!

Please note: for the mod to work properly, it is recommended that you play multiplayer or lan.

Mynthos juice is exotic and fruity, and now you can make it yourself!

 

To do this you will need:

 

- a mynthoser that you can craft like this :

![Mynthoser craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e26518d1e1c0ff1f0b8113d3f834352f1fb13b44.png)

- Mynthos parts which you can find on different animals such as: pigs, chickens, goats and cows.

 

- Player juice: You can try in get by killing other players when you have a glass bottle in your inventory or if the killed player has a glass bottle in his inventory.

 

Now that you've got everything, you can get started in the incredible world of mynthos juice and enjoy impressive effects such as haste, jump boost and speed  !

THIS IS A FAN MOD

Thanks _**captain_sunn**_ for the idea
